title: psydrax schimperianus subsp. occidentalis
intro: Psydrax schimperianus subsp. occidentalis, also known as West African forest pepper, is a plant species native to tropical regions of West Africa. The medicinal properties of this plant include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and analgesic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of West African forest pepper include pain relief, fever reduction, and the treatment of respiratory infections, among others. The plant's leaves and stems are often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, to harness its medicinal properties.
